attributes.name: Size
attributes.description: Size of the snapshot, specified in Gb.

attributes.name: Version
attributes.description: Raw version key used for linking e.g. 10.0.22631.5768

attributes.name: Platform
attributes.description: OS family e.g. Windows, macOS, iOS, Android

attributes.name: Major Version
attributes.description: e.g. Windows 11, macOS Sequoia, iOS 17, Android 14

attributes.name: Feature Update
attributes.description: Sub-release name e.g. 23H2, 15.6 — omitted where not applicable

attributes.name: Size
attributes.description: Size of the image when restored onto a persistent disk (in GB).

attributes.name: Archive Size
attributes.description: Size of the image tar.gz archive stored in Google Cloud Storage (in bytes).

attributes.name: Source Image
attributes.description: The source image used to create this image.

attributes.name: Source Snapshot
attributes.description: The source snapshot used to create this image.

attributes.name: Guest Cpus
attributes.description: The number of virtual CPUs that are available to the instance.

attributes.name: Shared Cpu
attributes.description: Whether this machine type has a shared CPU.

attributes.name: Maximum Persistent Disks Size
attributes.description: Maximum total persistent disks size (GB) allowed.

attributes.name: Memory
attributes.description: The amount of physical memory available to the instance, defined in MB.
